mapper.sql: id, projectId, projectType, memberRole, memberCode, memberName, phoneNum, email, fromFlag, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, effectiveTo, effectiveFrom
mapper.insert: insert into pm_project_member (id, projectId, projectType, memberRole, memberCode, memberName, phoneNum, email, fromFlag, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, effectiveTo, effectiveFrom ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{projectType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{memberRole,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phoneNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

insert into pm_project_member
id,
projectId,
projectType,
memberRole,
memberCode,
memberName,
phoneNum,
email,
fromFlag,
createTime,
createBy,
updateTime,
updateBy,
effectiveTo,
effectiveFrom,

#{projectType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{memberRole,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update pm_project_member
projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
projectType = #{projectType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
memberRole = #{memberRole,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
memberCode = #{memberCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
memberName = #{memberName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phoneNum = #{phoneNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fromFlag = #{fromFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update pm_project_member set projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, projectType = #{projectType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, memberRole = #{memberRole,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, memberCode = #{memberCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, memberName = #{memberName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phoneNum = #{phoneNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, fromFlag = #{fromFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from pm_project_member
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectId = #{projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectType = #{projectType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
memberRole = #{memberRole, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
memberCode = #{memberCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select * from pm_project_member
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectType = #{model.projectType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
memberRole = #{model.memberRole, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
memberCode = #{model.memberCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
memberName = #{model.memberName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
phoneNum = #{model.phoneNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
email = #{model.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
fromFlag = #{model.fromFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( memberRole like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or memberCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or memberName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or phoneNum like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or fromFlag like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from pm_project_member
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectType = #{model.projectType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
memberRole = #{model.memberRole, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
memberCode = #{model.memberCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
memberName = #{model.memberName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
phoneNum = #{model.phoneNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
email = #{model.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
fromFlag = #{model.fromFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( memberRole like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or memberCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or memberName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or phoneNum like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or fromFlag like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
